CustomField.formula:
IF(ISPICKVAL( Account__r.BI_Data__r.SYS_Health_Score__c , "Critical Engagement"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFpH", "red" , 16, 50)&"Critical Engagement ",
IF( ISPICKVAL( Account__r.BI_Data__r.SYS_Health_Score__c , "More Users Required"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xWeC", "yellow", 16, 50 )&"More Users Required " ,
IF( ISPICKVAL( Account__r.BI_Data__r.SYS_Health_Score__c , "Good Health"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFo5", "green", 16, 50 )&"Good Health ",
IF( ISPICKVAL( Account__r.BI_Data__r.SYS_Health_Score__c , "More Queries Required"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFp7", "Blue", 16, 50 )&"More Queries Required ",
""))))
CustomField.label: Account HealthScore
